prerequisites: An account on the Perk service whose API you intend to read from.
A Perk API key (the connector's required `api_key` secret field).
A start date for the initial sync, supplied to the required `start_date` config field, used as the earliest point from which records are retrieved.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single secret credential, the `api_key` field. Obtain an API key from your Perk account and supply it as the `api_key` secret; the connector sends it on each request to authorize access to your data.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your Perk API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Perk account and generate or copy an API key. This value populates the connector's required `api_key` secret field. Treat the key as a secret and do not commit it to source control.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configure the required fields
setupSteps.body: Configure the connector with the two required fields from its descriptor: set `api_key` to your Perk API key, and set `start_date` to the earliest date from which the connector should begin pulling records during the initial sync. Both fields are required.
